sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88871" key="prosdialhpte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσδια-ληπτέον</orth>, <sense id="n88871.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must hold, consider in addition</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1429.tlg001:p.48A" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.48A.</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:3:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
